arts.ttl: Daniel Farke breaks silence on Mateo Joseph approach and explains Leeds United transfer policy
arts.sum: The Leeds boss was reluctant to comment on specific details but gave an extensive explanation of why he held such a strict transfer stance, admitting that one of his aims for the window was to ensure none of his core players left Elland Road. Daniel Farke has revealed Leeds United did receive approaches for some of their players but knocked them back.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke may be forced into incredibly harsh Leeds United decision tomorrow
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Coventry City tomorrow night away from home eager to maintain their unbeaten run and potentially continue opening up the gap behind them. Leeds know they are going to face a much more significant test from Lampard’s resurgent Sky Blues, and Farke is going to take a very strong squad tomorrow night.

arts.ttl: Leeds United injury report for Coventry City amid Daniel Farke's passionate transfer message
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community Leeds United have no fresh injury concerns going into tomorrow's clash at Coventry City.

arts.ttl: Struijk starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Coventry City
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke's side gear up to face Coventry City in the Championship. The post Struijk starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Coventry City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 60 free transfers available to Coventry City as name of winger leaps from page
arts.sum: One name that jumps out of the page of available players is former Rangers and Liverpool winger Ryan Kent, who is looking for his next club after leaving Fenerbache. Ciaran Clark - Age: 35 - Last club: Stoke City

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s rivals complete post-window loan transfer for Southampton striker
arts.sum: Leeds United’s attempts to sign a striker came up short late in the January window, briefly flirting with the idea of signing Southampton’s Adam Armstrong. Leeds’ loan interest was rebuffed by the Saints and it was reported on deadline day that the club briefly weighed up a move for his teammate Adam Armstrong:

arts.ttl: Talented Liverpool forward joins Leeds United's promotion rivals after contract announcement
arts.sum: Leeds United's promotion rivals Sunderland have snapped up Jayden Danns on loan from Liverpool after the youngster penned a new long-term deal with the Reds. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard bemoans Championship schedule as Coventry City prepare for Leeds United challenge
arts.sum: Coventry City head coach Frank Lampard admits the timing of their clash with Leeds United is "not ideal". Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: 49ers and Daniel Farke January approach ruled out three Leeds transfer options
arts.sum: Daniel Farke had made clear that he would only bring in players who would improve the team, and would not bring in signings to merely bloat the squad. Some believe the club have failed to safety-proof their squad while others are confident that the current crop of players have enough quality to earn promotion on their own.

arts.ttl: Sunderland, Sheff Utd transfer worry laid out as Leeds United fluff big opportunity
arts.sum: All three secured at least one notable addition, Enzo Le Fee joining Sunderland, Ben Brereton Diaz and Tom Cannon joining Sheffield United, and Marcus Edwards moving to Burnley – all four players joining on initial loan deals that would become permanent upon promotion, a clear statement to add quality that these sides hope will translate to Premier League football. Leeds stand still in January; Sheff Utd, Sunderland and Burnley all make big statements
